meaning: n.驯马技术,马在表演时的一种优美而复杂的步法
examples: The regularity of the paces is fundamental to dressage.
The growth in popularity of international dressage has been dynamic.
For my first speech to inform, I talked about the equestrian art of dressage.
It would take an effort to have a rocking full house for the dressage final.
Eventing, like dressage and jumping, offers two Olympic titles in the individual and team disciplines.
